subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Thy cry hath been heard, and thy devotion hath been mentioned before the Wronged One, that is to say, in the tongue of the most exalted Concourse, upon the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احمد ندایت شنیده شد و توجهت لدی المظلوم مذکور آمد یعنی بلسان ملا اعلی در سبیل
subcodes.subjects: @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
